problems.title: Launching software shouldn't cost a fortune.
problems.desc: You have the idea, the vision, the market — but finding the right technical team takes time and results aren't always guaranteed.

approach.title: Focused on your product.
approach.desc: Our model is simple: a dedicated team that focuses 100% on your project's success.
approach.bar_bottom: Share of budget invested in the product
approach.item1_text: Every team member works exclusively on your project. No multitasking, no distractions.
approach.item2_text: Our experts are chosen for their passion and commitment. They are invested in your project's success.
approach.item3_text: Our members continuously train on the latest technologies to bring you the best.

why_clients.title: Why our clients choose us.
why_clients.desc: A complete team, a clear process, a product delivered on time. Here's what makes the difference.

expertise.title: All the talent to build your product.
expertise.desc: Artificial intelligence, development, data, design, infrastructure — a complete team, ready to bring your idea to life.

offers.title: Three ways to get started.
offers.desc: From a first audit to a complete product delivery — choose the entry point that matches your stage.

pricing.title: Estimate your project.
pricing.desc: Select your need and desired scale for an instant estimate.

process.title: From idea to product: {count} steps.
process.desc: A clear process with validation at every stage. You stay in control from start to finish.

cta.title: Ready to build your intelligent SaaS?
cta.desc: Tell us about your idea. We'll get back to you within 24h with a team proposal and an action plan.

footer.brand_text: We build your intelligent SaaS — from idea to product. Dedicated team, concrete results.
